settings.text: Every classroom team includes a lead teacher with early childhood credentials and a dedicated aide.

settings.subtitle: Infants
settings.title: Willow room
settings.description: Separate sleep room with sound machines, bottle-prep kitchen visible to parents, and daily TummyTime lab notes.

settings.subtitle: Toddlers
settings.title: Maple room
settings.description: Loft climbing, art easels at toddler height, and potty-training partnership with color-coded communication logs.

settings.subtitle: Preschool
settings.title: Cedar studio
settings.description: Loose-parts math, story acting, and a light table for pre-writing. Weekly library cart rotation.

settings.subtitle: Pre-K
settings.title: Oak hall
settings.description: Kindergarten readiness portfolios, journaling, and STEM Fridays with visiting scientists.

settings.title: Rhythm families feel
settings.description: Schedules flex for weather and moods—this is a typical flow.

settings.title: Arrival & connection
settings.description: Greeting at the classroom door, hand washing, and a calm table invitation within five minutes.

settings.title: Exploration blocks
settings.description: 90-minute uninterrupted play with teacher scaffolding—outdoors whenever possible.

settings.title: Nourishment
settings.description: Family-style lunch and snacks prepared on-site; allergies tracked on tablets at every meal.

settings.title: Rest & reflection
settings.description: Quiet story, nap or rest bags, then afternoon studio specials (music, Spanish, yoga).

settings.question: What is your sick policy?
settings.answer: We follow Wisconsin child care exclusion guidelines. Temperatures 100.4°F+ require 24 hours fever-free before return.

settings.question: Do you offer part-time?
settings.answer: Three-day blocks for toddlers and preschool; infants require full-time enrollment due to continuity of care.

settings.question: How do cameras work?
settings.answer: Live feeds are classroom-wide only, password protected, and disabled during nap and changing routines.

settings.title: Want the full handbook?
settings.text: Request a PDF after your tour or email hello@littleoaks.example.
